description:
Full-Stack PEAN Developer | Luminess Madagascar
Designed and developed a Human Resources application focused on performance evaluation and talent management.

Tech Stack: PostgreSQL, Express.js, Angular, Node.js (PEAN).

Key Contribution: Engineered an evaluation module to automate skill tracking and career development workflows.

Outcome: Streamlined HR processes by implementing a robust relational database structure and an intuitive user interface.
